issue: Customer cannot reset password
resolution: Asked customer to use forgot password flow and reset email link

issue: Customer charged twice for subscription
resolution: Refunded duplicate payment and escalated billing review

issue: Mobile app crashes on login
resolution: Suggested clearing app cache and updating app version

issue: Payment failed during checkout
resolution: Verified payment gateway issue and advised retry after 10 minutes

issue: User not receiving verification email
resolution: Whitelisted support email domain and resent verification email

issue: Subscription cancellation not reflecting
resolution: Manually updated subscription status and confirmed cancellation

issue: Fraudulent transaction reported on account
resolution: Temporarily locked account and escalated to fraud investigation team

issue: Customer unable to login after password reset
resolution: Cleared old authentication sessions and guided user to login again

issue: App freezes on payment screen
resolution: Collected device logs and suggested updating to latest app version

issue: Incorrect billing amount charged
resolution: Adjusted invoice and processed partial refund

issue: Customer not receiving password reset link
resolution: Checked spam folder issue and resent reset email

issue: Premium subscription features not activated
resolution: Synced subscription data and refreshed account permissions

issue: Payment successful but order not confirmed
resolution: Verified payment receipt and manually created order entry

issue: User account flagged for suspicious login activity
resolution: Forced password reset and enabled two-factor authentication

issue: Application crashes when uploading profile picture
resolution: Suggested reducing image size and fixed upload timeout issue

issue: Customer unable to update payment method
resolution: Resolved card tokenization issue and retried update process

issue: Email notifications stopped working
resolution: Re-enabled notification preferences and tested email delivery

issue: Subscription renewed despite cancellation request
resolution: Issued refund and corrected auto-renewal settings

issue: Customer reports unauthorized account access
resolution: Logged out all active sessions and escalated security review

issue: Login OTP not received on mobile
resolution: Verified SMS gateway issue and provided backup email OTP option

issue: Customer reported that their account gets automatically logged out every few minutes while using the web dashboard, especially when switching between billing and analytics pages.
resolution: Investigated session timeout logs and identified an issue with expired authentication tokens not refreshing correctly. Applied a temporary backend fix, cleared invalid sessions for the customer, and advised them to log in again after clearing browser cookies and cache.

issue: Customer noticed multiple failed payment attempts on their bank statement even though the subscription purchase was completed successfully on the platform.
resolution: Verified transaction records with the payment gateway and confirmed duplicate authorization attempts caused by a timeout during checkout. Assured the customer that failed authorization holds would automatically reverse within 5–7 business days and escalated the issue to the payments engineering team for monitoring.

issue: Mobile application crashes immediately after enabling biometric authentication on Android devices running older operating system versions.
resolution: Collected crash reports and identified incompatibility with specific biometric APIs on Android 10 devices. Suggested disabling biometric login temporarily, provided steps for manual login access, and included the issue in the upcoming mobile patch release.

issue: Customer reported receiving subscription renewal reminder emails even after permanently deleting their account from the platform two weeks earlier.
resolution: Reviewed account deletion workflow and discovered delayed cleanup jobs were not removing users from the marketing notification queue. Manually removed the customer from all email campaigns, confirmed account deletion completion, and escalated the cleanup automation issue to the infrastructure team.

issue: A business customer reported that invoice PDFs downloaded from the billing portal were showing incorrect tax calculations for international transactions.
resolution: Compared invoice generation logs with tax service responses and identified a currency conversion mismatch affecting VAT calculations. Regenerated corrected invoices, emailed updated copies to the customer, and deployed a fix to ensure accurate regional tax handling moving forward.

issue: Customer claimed their loyalty reward points disappeared after upgrading from a monthly subscription plan to an annual enterprise plan.
resolution: Reviewed account migration history and found that reward balances were not properly transferred during subscription upgrades. Restored the missing loyalty points manually, confirmed balance visibility on the customer dashboard, and created an internal bug report for the subscription migration workflow.

issue: Several users from the same organization reported suspicious login attempts from unknown international IP addresses and were concerned about a possible credential leak.
resolution: Performed a security audit on affected accounts and confirmed that credentials were likely compromised through password reuse on external websites. Forced password resets for all impacted users, enabled mandatory two-factor authentication for the organization, and shared security best practices with the customer’s IT administrator.

issue: Customer reported that uploaded documents intermittently disappear from the dashboard after refreshing the page, although upload success notifications were displayed.
resolution: Investigated file storage synchronization logs and identified delayed indexing between the upload service and dashboard cache layer. Reprocessed missing documents, verified successful visibility in the customer account, and deployed additional monitoring to prevent future synchronization delays.
